context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ash-framework instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define attributes, then define relationships and actions incrementally. See [Resource Definition](#resource-definition) below.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `Ash.Changeset` and domain functions (e.g., `MyApp.Blog.create!`) to interact with resources. See [Using Actions](#using-actions) below.
